steps.title: Fastest path: graph the equations as written
steps.content:
Type the equations into Desmos exactly as they appear, one per row:
$$y = 3x + 9$$
$$3y = 8x - 6$$
You do not need to solve or rearrange them first.

steps.title: Read the x-coordinate
steps.content: Click the intersection point and read the x-coordinate. It matches D, 57.

steps.title: Why this works
steps.content: A solution to a system is exactly a point that lies on every graph in the system. Desmos is showing the same shared point that substitution or elimination would find.
